name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES state, votes, decision

Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "Init"]
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "None"]
    /\ decision = "None"

Prepare ==
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Init"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decision' = decision

VoteYes ==
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]
        /\ decision' = decision

VoteNo ==
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]
        /\ decision' = decision

Commit ==
    /\ decision = "Commit"
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Committed"
        /\ state' = state
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decision' = decision

Abort ==
    /\ decision = "Abort"
    /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Aborted"
        /\ state' = state
        /\ votes' = votes
        /\ decision' = decision

Next ==
    \/ Prepare
    \/ VoteYes
    \/ VoteNo
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort

TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in [participants -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
    /\ votes \in [participants -> {"Yes", "No", "None"}]
    /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "None"}

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decision>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = <<1, 2, 3, 4, 5>>
        /\ flag = <<FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
           /\ flag[2] = FALSE
           /\ flag[3] = FALSE
           /\ flag[4] = FALSE
           /\ flag[5] = FALSE
           /\ flag[1] = TRUE
           /\ num[1] = 1
           /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
           /\ flag[2] = FALSE
           /\ flag[3] = FALSE
           /\ flag[4] = FALSE
           /\ flag[5] = FALSE
           /\ flag[2] = TRUE
           /\ num[2] = 2
           /\ flag[2] = FALSE
       \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
           /\ flag[2] = FALSE
           /\ flag[3] = FALSE
           /\ flag[4] = FALSE
           /\ flag[5] = FALSE
           /\ flag[3] = TRUE
           /\ num[3] = 3
           /\ flag[3] = FALSE
       \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
           /\ flag[2] = FALSE
           /\ flag[3] = FALSE
           /\ flag[4] = FALSE
           /\ flag[5] = FALSE
           /\ flag[4] = TRUE
           /\ num[4] = 4
           /\ flag[4] = FALSE
       \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
           /\ flag[2] = FALSE
           /\ flag[3] = FALSE
           /\ flag[4] = FALSE
           /\ flag[5] = FALSE
           /\ flag[5] = TRUE
           /\ num[5] = 5
           /\ flag[5] = FALSE

TypeOK == /\ num \in <<1, 2, 3, 4, 5>>
           /\ flag \in <<FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        /\ writer_active = FALSE
        /\ Len(readers) = 0
    \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        /\ writer_active = FALSE
        /\ Len(readers) = 0
    \/ /\ writer_active' = writer_active
        /\ Len(readers) = Len(readers')
        /\ \A i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = readers'[i]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values
